description: Default capability for the Clavis main window. Narrow by design: core + non-secret store + the window controls the frameless chrome drives (minimize/maximize/unmaximize/close/drag/is-maximized) + the launch-at-login toggle (autostart enable/disable/is-enabled) + the export/import open/save file dialogs (dialog open/save only) + opening the Report-an-issue link (github.com over https only).
